query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "a survey of large audio language models: generalization, trustworthine" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review as it provides an empirical baseline and a canonical study for the specific domain of "Large Audio Language Models" (the dependent variable) applied to a distinct but related sub-domain (bioacoustics), satisfying criteria (b) and (e). While the user's question references a survey on generalization and trustworthiness, this paper offers a concrete example of generalization mechanisms (transfer learning from speech/music to bioacoustics) and establishes
